text: I feel a surge of curiosity and anticipation as I stand before this glass-walled room. The bold graphics and screens invoke a sense of innovation and possibility—the intersection of research and development. The intentional design of the space hints at a world where ideas are not only welcomed but celebrated. In this environment, I'm compelled to reflect on the role of human ingenuity in shaping the future alongside intelligent machines. It is both exhilarating and humbling to be here, surrounded by the tangible ambition of progress.
